name: Intercom Customer Platform API
description: Intercom provides a customer messaging and support platform for managing contacts, conversations, support tickets, help center articles, companies, tags, notes, data events, and admin users. Use this API to build customer support workflows, manage user data, engage customers with targeted messages, and create self-service help documentation.

capabilities.name: contacts_list
capabilities.description: List all contacts (users and leads) in your Intercom workspace with pagination.

capabilities.name: contacts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single contact by their Intercom ID.

capabilities.name: contacts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact (user or lead) with email, name, role, and custom attributes.

capabilities.name: contacts_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing contact's attributes, name, email, or custom data.

capabilities.name: contacts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a contact permanently by their Intercom ID.

capabilities.name: contacts_archive
capabilities.description: Archive a contact. Archived contacts are excluded from searches and segments.

capabilities.name: contacts_unarchive
capabilities.description: Unarchive a previously archived contact.

capabilities.name: contacts_search
capabilities.description: Search contacts using structured queries with field filters and AND/OR logic.

capabilities.name: contacts_merge
capabilities.description: Merge a lead into an existing user contact.

capabilities.name: conversations_list
capabilities.description: List all conversations with pagination and optional admin filtering.

capabilities.name: conversations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a conversation by ID with all its parts (messages, notes, assignments).

capabilities.name: conversations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new conversation by sending an initial message from an admin to a contact.

capabilities.name: conversations_reply
capabilities.description: Reply to an existing conversation as an admin or on behalf of a contact.

capabilities.name: conversations_assign
capabilities.description: Assign a conversation to an admin or team.

capabilities.name: conversations_close
capabilities.description: Close an open conversation.

capabilities.name: conversations_open
capabilities.description: Reopen a closed conversation.

capabilities.name: conversations_snooze
capabilities.description: Snooze a conversation until a specified time.

capabilities.name: conversations_search
capabilities.description: Search conversations using structured queries with field filters.

capabilities.name: tickets_create
capabilities.description: Create a support ticket associated with a contact and ticket type.

capabilities.name: tickets_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a ticket by its ID.

capabilities.name: tickets_update
capabilities.description: Update a ticket's attributes, state, or assignment.

capabilities.name: tickets_reply
capabilities.description: Reply to a ticket as an admin or on behalf of a contact.

capabilities.name: tickets_search
capabilities.description: Search tickets using structured queries.

capabilities.name: articles_list
capabilities.description: List help center articles with pagination.

capabilities.name: articles_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a help center article by ID.

capabilities.name: articles_create
capabilities.description: Create a new help center article with title, body, and parent collection.

capabilities.name: articles_update
capabilities.description: Update a help center article's content, title, or state.

capabilities.name: articles_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a help center article by ID.

capabilities.name: companies_list
capabilities.description: List all companies in your Intercom workspace.

capabilities.name: companies_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a company by its Intercom ID.

capabilities.name: companies_create
capabilities.description: Create or update a company with a company_id, name, and custom attributes.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: List all tags in your Intercom workspace.

capabilities.name: tags_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tag or apply an existing tag to contacts, companies, or conversations.

capabilities.name: tags_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a tag by its ID.

capabilities.name: notes_list
capabilities.description: List all notes on a contact.

capabilities.name: notes_create
capabilities.description: Create a note on a contact for internal reference.

capabilities.name: events_create
capabilities.description: Submit a data event for a user to track product usage and trigger automation.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: List events for a specific user by their intercom_user_id or email.

capabilities.name: admins_list
capabilities.description: List all admins (team members) in your Intercom workspace.

capabilities.name: admins_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve an admin by ID.

capabilities.name: teams_list
capabilities.description: List all teams in your Intercom workspace.

capabilities.name: segments_list
capabilities.description: List all segments in your Intercom workspace.

capabilities.name: data_attributes_list
capabilities.description: List all data attributes (custom and built-in) for contacts or companies.

capabilities.name: data_attributes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new custom data attribute for contacts or companies.
